hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and normalizes KYT provider outputs to structure wallet risk reviews, route alerts, preserve evidence, and support audit-ready compliance workflows for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams managing wallet and transaction risk struggle with isolated provider data that slows decision workflows. This fragmentation creates gaps in risk context, complicates case linkage and weakens audit visibility for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk from multiple KYT providers into a single normalized workflow that links alerts, cases, decisions and audit evidence for streamlined compliance operations.
workflow_title: From KYT provider outputs to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY collects KYT provider signals, applies configured rules, routes cases for review, records compliance decisions and preserves evidence within one operational workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. Structured compliance decisions
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms fragmented KYT provider outputs into unified workflows with case linkage, decision evidence and audit-ready reporting without replacing existing KYT tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams by connecting KYT provider outputs into governed workflows with preserved evidence and enterprise-ready deployment controls.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY connect and manage KYT provider outputs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYT alerts route into compliance case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves wallet risk decision history

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects, normalizes and routes KYT provider outputs into structured reviews, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle KYT provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates multiple KYT provider signals, applies internal risk rules, routes alerts for review, creates linked cases and maintains decision logs within one connected compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve KYT audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves KYT-related cases, alerts, decision logs and supporting provider evidence securely for audit readiness and clear review history across wallet and transaction risk activity.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates seamlessly with existing KYT and blockchain analytics providers without requiring replacement, creating a provider-neutral orchestration layer over current compliance technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or analytics providers but connects their outputs into a structured, auditable compliance operating layer above existing tools.
final_title: Connect KYT alerts into structured compliance cases
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes wallet risk signals, normalizes provider outputs, and supports audit-ready decision workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
